Name: DAMAGE_WIND_CATE_PARAM
Description: Defines how wind effects interact with different object categories and visual/sound effects, including fade behavior and hit response control.

Fields.Name: Apply for Cloth
Fields.Description: Applies wind influence to cloth materials such as capes or garments.

Fields.Name: Apply for Grass
Fields.Description: Applies wind influence to grass and similar foliage.

Fields.Name: Apply for Object
Fields.Description: Applies wind influence to environmental objects.

Fields.Name: Apply for SFX
Fields.Description: Controls wind interaction with general visual effects.

Fields.Name: Apply for Impact SFX
Fields.Description: Special effects triggered on wind-related impact or collision.

Fields.Name: Erase SFX on Hit Transition
Fields.Description: Forces SFX to transition into a removal/clearing state when hit.

Fields.Name: Fade-In Time
Fields.Description: Time in seconds for wind effect to fade in.

Fields.Name: Fade-Out Time
Fields.Description: Time in seconds for wind effect to fade out.
